interpretation: EXCESS=v3(U1xU2)=lookahead digits of primitive-part parallelism. max FINITE excess bounded & flat across depth => bounded horizon (HOLDS). grows with depth => unbounded lookahead (FAILS). INF states = exact Omega=0 cross-collinear pairs reachable in UNCONSTRAINED ambient descent (the construction forbids these via joint legality; their reachability alone is not a FAILS).
